author: guillermo_rauch
example_posts: Excited to announce Next.js 15. What we've learned: the best frameworks are invisible. They let you focus on building, not configuring.
The future of the web is at the edge. Faster, closer to users, globally distributed. This is what we've been building toward at Vercel.
Developer experience is not a luxury. It's the foundation of velocity. Companies that invest in DX ship faster, hire better, and win.
